scripts.generate-config: node -e "const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL || process.env.SUPABASE_URL || ''; const supabaseAnonKey = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY || process.env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY || ''; const cfg = { supabase: { url: supabaseUrl, anonKey: supabaseAnonKey }, adminEmail: process.env.ADMIN_EMAIL || '', storageBucket: process.env.STORAGE_BUCKET || 'portfolio-assets' }; console.log('window.EA_RUNTIME_CONFIG = ' + JSON.stringify(cfg, null, 2) + ';');" > portfolio/assets/js/runtime-config.js
